raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding a disputed transaction with my credit card company, related to an order placed with XXXX XXXX on my XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Despite multiple attempts ( online, over the phone, and my letter ) to resolve the issue directly with my credit card company as a chargeback, I have not received a response. 

Summary of the dispute : - I attempted to cancel the transaction shortly after the purchase due to selecting the wrong model. 
- Despite providing more than XXXX hours ' notice before shipment, the vendor failed to acknowledge my cancellation request until almost a week after the order was placed, by which point they had already dispatched the item. 
- The vendor proceeded with shipping the product despite my cancellation requests. 
- The vendor insists on charging me restocking fees and return postage for a product I never intended to receive due to their delay in responding to my cancellation request. 

I have also sent a demand letter to the company ( in XXXX ) that operates as " XXXX Cases ''. I received no response from there. 

I kindly request the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to investigate this matter and take appropriate action. I have attached a copy of the letter I sent to my credit card company, along with a copy of the email chain with the vendor. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
